name: Possum Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix nuts, flour and margarine.
2. Press mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
4. Cool completely.
5. Mix creamed cheese with 1 cup powdered sugar and 1 cup Cool Whip.
6. Spread over the crust.
7. Mix milk, pudding mixes, remaining 1/4 cup powdered sugar and vanilla.
8. Spread over the creamed cheese layer.
9. Spread remaining Cool Whip on top.
10. Top with chopped nuts or shaved chocolate.
